title: DFH or NVR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: DFH vs. NVR: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: NVR (NVR) Q3 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: NVR (NVR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -6.32% and 10.16%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Home builder NVR misses profit expectations, as new orders fell 15% but prices rose 3%
text: Home builder and mortgage banking company NVR Inc. NVR, +0.01% reported third-quarter profit that missed expectations while revenue beat, as new orders fell but prices increased. Net income rose to $411.4 million, or $118.51 a share, from $332.1 million, or $86.44 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: The Housing Market Is Crashing; Will Stocks Follow Suit?
text: How low will homebuilder stocks go this time? That is the top question on investors' minds as the biggest housing market slowdown in 15 years begins to unfold.

title: Is Now the Time to Buy Homebuilding Stocks?
text: Things are looking very uncertain for one of the largest sectors of the economy right now.

title: 3 Outperforming Homebuilders to Consider as Sentiment Declines
text: With mortgage rates rising on the back of climbing interest rates, homebuilder sentiment in the single-family home market has tumbled to half of what it was six months ago.

title: 5 Stocks That Turned a $5,000 Investment Into $1 Million
text: All five of these companies have made patient investors millionaires (or much more). Here's what you can learn from them.
